title: Business and Management
summary: Useful for students who want jobs in administration, sales, marketing, operations, and entrepreneurship.

title: Information Technology
summary: A strong direction for software, web, support, and data-oriented careers.

title: Hospitality and Tourism
summary: A practical field for hotel operations, travel services, and guest-facing roles.

title: Health and Public Health
summary: Best for students interested in healthcare support, health education, and community programs.

title: Education and Training
summary: Supports teaching, tutoring, learning support, and training-focused positions.

title: Engineering and Construction
summary: A route to technical project work, infrastructure, and site-based careers.
